violations.text: The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/22/2023

The wall by the slicer in the upstairs kitchen are constructed of dry wall. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2023
Allergen advisory statement not present on menus or order point. New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2023

There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food. Food employee health agreement provided to site. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2023
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Provided site with state guidance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2023

Employee was observed handling money, donned gloves without washing their hands. Food employees must wash their hands before putting on gloves. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2023

The basement does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2023

Deli meats and cheeses in the display case were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2023

The presence of large flies is not controlled as evidenced by large flies observed during inspection. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2023
A patron's dog was observed in the food establishment. Live animals may not be allowed on the premises of a food establishment. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2023

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2023
Single service items and drink mixes were observed stored on the floor in the basement. Single service items and food must be 6 inches off the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/08/2023
Hot water not available at handwashing sink in kitchen area. New Violation. Correct By: 06/08/2023
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2023

The wall by the slicer in the upstairs kitchen are constructed of dry wall. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2023
The ceiling in the basement area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2023
